\tzpentry{ID4340}{Chemical Potential Scaling Law}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4340 introduces Chemical Potential Scaling Law as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[
$\mu \propto M R^{\alpha} \Omega$
\]
